gauge.name: Wind River near Kinnear

impacts.statement: Flood stage. Agricultural flooding along both banks becomes more widespread and intensifies. Water begins to encroach the north end of Highway 132.
Bankfull stage. Minor agricultural flooding along right bank. Water begins to move towards low areas north of Highway 132.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
